steps.title: Find the unusual pattern
steps.content: Most high and medium entropy alloys become less tough as temperature falls. To support Liu et al.'s conclusion that these alloys behave differently, the graph should show the opposite pattern: greater toughness at the lower cryogenic temperature.

steps.title: Compare across temperatures
steps.content: Choice A compares the two alloys at one temperature. Choice B compares propagation with initiation, not the typical temperature trend. Choice C describes change size between temperature intervals. The remaining choice shows both toughness measures are lower at room temperature than at 20 kelvins. The answer is D.
